title: FIFA World Cup 26™ - Spain vs. Saudi Arabia, June 21, 2026 | Event at Mercedes-Benz Stadium
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
We listen to what our fans desire most and respond with a fan first, world-class experience.

Check out the free weekly programs and other signature Home Depot Backyard events!

At Mercedes-Benz Stadium, we innovate continuously to deliver a world-class experience at each visit. Discover our latest innovations below, leveraging biometric technology to minimize wait times & and maximize your enjoyment.

Leveraging our stadium as a force for good with a heart for our community.

Browse all newest stadium news by title, category, or date to learn about what is happening at the country’s busiest stadium.

Mercedes-Benz Stadium is the first professional sports venue in the United States to achieve LEED Platinum Certification.

The WSA Program is Mercedes-Benz Stadium’s youth development and employability program for high-school aged students.

Mercedes-Benz Stadium provides Not for Profit groups with opportunities to volunteer at Concession Stands to raise money for their charitable organization or to fundraise by selling tickets to Atlanta Falcons and Atlanta United events.

From original painted murals to monumental sculptures, the splendor of the unsurpassed collection will inspire all who visit the stadium.

Purchase tickets for upcoming events and manage tickets already purchased.

Purchase parking, book transportation, or view directions.

Browse vendor menus by category, concourse, vegetarian, gluten-free and much more.

Get answers to the most important questions surrounding your visit.

Get ready for event day and dive into our stadium maps for parking, field level, main concourses, and suite levels.

Experience the stadium like never before with comfort and class.

Shop online or visit us at our local storefronts both in-stadium and at Atlantic Station.

Rules and restrictions you need to know before attending an event.

Plan your departure from Mercedes-Benz Stadium efficiently.

Find official Atlanta Falcons and Atlanta United merchandise at our team stores.

Get Closer Than Ever to FIFA WORLD CUP 26™ with On Location.

Experience professional football like never before, with opportunities for premium seating and a world-class experience.

Creating a new era for soccer in Atlanta, join us to unite and conquer both on and off the pitch.

We are the Epicenter for Soccer in the United States.

Have questions or want to let us know about your experience?

Stay up to date on stadium events on your favorite platforms.

Text us at (470) 444-0234 for in-venue emergencies during events.

Email our signature services team for all Clubs and Suites support needs.

Looking for more information about Atlanta Falcons season tickets, or want more information about your benefits?

Looking for more information about Atlanta United season tickets, or want more information about your benefits?

Experience the signature features of Mercedes-Benz Stadium, including stops at locker rooms, the field, and more! Tour routes and locations are subject to change.

It all begins with the lives of our team members, the rewarding experiences we share, and the lasting relationships we build.

Reach out with any media inquiries and find all stadium toolkits, relevant images, video assets, and more.

Host your next business or personal event in one of our world-class event spaces.

Explore maps for each concourse of the stadium, as well as exterior and parking layouts.

Learn more about the stadium — the heart and soul of the city in a forest.

Be part of soccer history! ⚽ Get early access to Official Hospitality for FIFA World Cup 26. Secure your premium package now!

To access and present your match tickets, you'll need to download the official "FWC26 Mobile Tickets" App. All tickets are delivered and managed digitally through the app — make sure it's installed and your account is linked before match day.

MARTA provides convenient access to the stadium via Vine City, GWCC/CNN Center, Garnett, and Five Points stations, all within walking distance of the venue — no parking, no gridlock, no stress. Plan your trip in advance at itsmarta.com .

We have two designated rideshare access zones. One is located in South Downtown along Broad Street between Trinity Avenue and Mitchell Street, with convenient access to Entrances E, F, and G. And the other is located along Northside Drive at GWCC Bus Lane C, with convenient access to Entrances A, B, and C.

The Rapid Atlanta Bus Rapid Transit A-Line provides a direct, high-frequency connection to Mercedes-Benz Stadium from key stops across the city. With dedicated lanes and quick boarding, it's a fast and reliable alternative to driving. Check schedules and routes at itsmarta.com/Aline.aspx ahead of match day.

Accessible drop-off and pick-up is available on both sides of the stadium. Head to GWCC Bus Lane C on the west side for access to Entrances B and C, or the Transportation Terminal on the east side for access to Entrance E. Dedicated staff will be on-site at both locations to assist you every step of the way.

Plan your arrival with ease. Our map shows all designated entry points around Stadium, including accessible entrances and ticket gate assignments. Knowing your gate before you arrive will help you skip the confusion and get to your seat faster.

All FIFA stadiums follow a clear bag policy to maintain a safe and efficient entry process. Only certain types of bags are allowed inside the stadium. These approved bags must be clear and made of plastic, vinyl, or PVC material. ALL OTHER BAGS THAT DO NOT MEET THE BAG GUIDELINES ABOVE WILL BE PROHIBITED FROM ENTERING THE STADIUM. Clear bags will be available to purchse for a fee.

Mobile lockers are available on-site so you can leave the extra gear behind and focus on the match. Find a station near you when you arrive, rent a locker in minutes, and pick everything up on your way out.

Your safety is our priority from the moment you arrive to the moment you leave. Mercedes-Benz Stadium is equipped with trained security staff, medical personnel, and clearly marked emergency resources throughout the venue so you can focus on the game.

Fan Info Points are located at gates 1 and 2 and in sections 116, 201, 244, 301, and 333.

Fan Info Points provide an array of services, including the following: General information and wayfinding, Fan feedback collection and issue resolution, Ticketing troubleshooting, including accessibility relocation requests and duplicate ticket resolution, Information on accessible services, including vertical transportation, wayfinding, listening devices, and sensory room access and resources, Lost and found services, Lost fan reporting and recovery, Reconnect wristbands, First-game certificates and other fan engagement opportunities, Service recovery for fans.

Get all the essential details for your visit — bag policies, prohibited items, accessibility info, and more — in FIFA's official Stadium A-Z Guide.

Make Your Matchday Safe and Stress-Free. Know the do's and don'ts, understand stadium policies, find resources and more.

Please note: Strollers are not permitted inside the stadium for FIFA World Cup matches.

In the event of a Severe Weather Alert during your visit, Mercedes-Benz Stadium activates established protocols to ensure guest safety and a coordinated operational response.

During arrival, gate operations will be suspended until conditions improve. Guests will be directed to take shelter in nearby parking structures, tents, or other covered areas on-site. When it's safe to proceed, gate operations will resume. Always follow the guidance of stadium staff and posted instructions.

Thank you for your cooperation in keeping Mercedes-Benz Stadium a safe and enjoyable environment.
_note: 网页赛报正文逐字留底（已去直播/电视/版权/导航杂讯）。
